name: Plasmapheresis aging-biomarker registry remains unknown status with no posted results
summary: NCT04897113 remains unknown status with estimated 2022 completion and no posted results in the June 9, 2026 API view.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT04897113 as unknown status with 80 estimated participants, estimated 2022 completion, and no posted results in the June 9, 2026 API view.
population_or_model: Men and women aged 40 to 55 years
quantitative_note: Registry enrollment is 80 estimated; result status is not posted.
caveats: No-results registry status is not evidence of benefit.
The registry should be monitored for publication or posted results before changing the outlook.
The design mixes albumin-compensated and non-albumin plasmapheresis streams.
